title: Melted Brown Sugar Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: Tender and comforting Brazilian dish featuring dark soft brown sugar, perfect for a low-calorie dinner option.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono-grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
In a small bowl, mix together the dark brown sugar and 1 tablespoon of water.
Brush the melted brown sugar mixture onto the grilled chicken during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
